violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC too it out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC discarded ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The back storage area was observed in poor repair (missing ceiling tiles and holes in wall behind fridge. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
